title: An Ordinance Authorizing the Annual Budget of the Municipal Government of Los Baños for Fiscal Year 2020 in the Amount of Three Hundred Fifty Nine Million One Hundred Eight Thousand Two Hundred Ninety Eight Pesos and 00/100 (P 359,108,298.00) Covering the Various Expenditures of the General Fund Proper in the Amount of Three Hundred Forty Three Million Seven Hundred Twenty Seven Thousand Three Hundred Ten Pesos and 00/100 (P 343,727,310.00) and Two (2) Special Accounts Specifically for Market Op
